---

The inability to get through the gatekeeper is a question I've been asked for 30 years. How do I get through the gatekeeper grant? The lead is the gatekeeper. I can't find the decision maker. How do I get through? You've got to be creative. First of all, you've got to love gatekeepers. You can't hate them. You hate on a gatekeeper, you will always be outside. That gatekeeper can control that customer, that consumer, and ultimately has the keys to that decision. So what you have to do with the gatekeepers, you've got to save their position and think like they think. They were given a task, a job, to get John or Joanne some data. Joanne, go get me this data right here. Give me this information. I need this, this, and this. Now, when you give that data to the gatekeeper, you need to respond in an email or text or a video email, which would be really powerful, or set up a time to do a go-to meeting with her. Look how powerful that would be. Say, look, I'd like to set up a go-to meeting to do a three-minute conference call with you so you can see who I am and what I can provide you. Also using Skype and go-to meetings with a gatekeeper is so powerful because you become real when the other three people didn't even respond to her. I've had people tell me, wow, people treat me like I don't even exist and you want to do a Skype call, a go-to meeting call, you sent me a video conference, I become real. Okay, I become real. I can also take on FaceTime on my phone. I can walk around my office and actually show the office. I can show products. I can be helpful to the gatekeeper to make their job easier and to put them, the gatekeeper, in a better position and a better light with the decision maker so that she can go back and say to John, John, I'm having a go-to meeting tomorrow at three o'clock with this guy that's going to walk me through their whole, maybe I'm looking for stone for outside for his new driveway that he's going to pour. He's going to walk without, either one of us leaving the office, he's going to walk out there and show us all the different slabs of stone he has. This is brilliant, okay? The gatekeeper is valuable. They have keys to the deal. The more the gatekeeper likes you, the better off. Send gifts. Send an invite like we talked about in the follow-up series. Send something special. Tell them you appreciate them. Look, pour it on with the gatekeeper. They have keys to the gate that control the decision maker to that product that you want to sell.
